chapter_title.en: The Prayer for Eclipses, Earthquakes, Winds, and Oppression and Their Causes

text: 1532 - وَ رَوَى حَمَّادُ بْنُ عُثْمَانَ عَنْ أَبِي عَبْدِ اَللَّهِ عَلَيْهِ اَلسَّلاَمُ قَالَ: ذَكَرُوا عِنْدَهُ اِنْكِسَافَ اَلْقَمَرِ وَ مَا يَلْقَى اَلنَّاسُ مِنْ شِدَّتِهِ فَقَالَ عَلَيْهِ اَلسَّلاَمُ «إِذَا اِنْجَلَى مِنْهُ شَيْءٌ فَقَدِ اِنْجَلَى.

en.bab-ul-qaim-publications:
Hadith.1532 - Hammad ibn Uthman narrated from Imam Jafar ibn Muhammad Al-Sadiq (as) that during a discussion about the eclipse of the moon and the hardship that people endure because of it,
He (Imam Al-Sadiq) said: "If a part of it (the moon) has cleared, then it has cleared”.
